item.title: Odysee content DMCA flagged(trying out LBRY)
item.description:
One of my uploads was DMCA flagged, and supposedly i can dispute, but i can’t check if it’s a copyright troll or author. can’t find anything in search engine about that video, i don’t know what part of video is infringing, who is the author, literally anything. I can’t go to creator and buy merch or whatever. I thought that maybe i will find who made this video if it gets reported or something, but that is not the case.

I think they made this quick dirty system only because they are forced by uncle sam(which is true). Obviously the only platform that sucks is youtube, right?

Anyway, lbry and odysee is still better. they give good hosting for content.
A company can pay for a law, and another company like Odysee can’t just break it. sometimes it happens with privacy.
I will make torrents when something is removed, or when i have to remove it. Isn’t it already based on bittorrent? Bittorrent-based. Based. 😎

When you learn about copyright, how it works, what is it’s purpose, and which groups exploit it the most:

“Who radicalized you?”
You did.
